title: Release version for cert-3 stabilization: 0.4.1 (PATCH) vs seed's 0.5.x
description: The seed requested a '0.5.x PATCH release', but the current version is 0.4.0, so a non-functional PATCH is 0.4.1 — 0.5.0 would be a MINOR bump, contradicting the seed's own 'this is a non-functional fix' rationale. ADR-0006 recommends 0.4.1. This is the Release Manager's versioning call before merge.

title: Triage: backlog candidates from ai-bookkeeper scan (2026-05-29)
description: Standalone backlog scan surfaced 1 high-value consolidation candidate (ADR 0005, fully verified in code) and 1 housekeeping item. No work is implemented until you accept — and per ADR-0005 scope correction, its Task 6 is stale (page.tsx lint already green) and should be dropped. Accept fans out to implementation as a focused PR sequence; defer re-queues; reject (with reason) suppresses the category.

title: Backlog triage — ai-bookkeeper (2 candidates need accept/reject/defer)
description: Standalone scan surfaced 2 backlog candidates at HEAD b510ec9. Nothing is implemented without your accept. bl-0005 is a Proposed architectural change (8 feature consumers) — human territory. bl-hk1 is a low-risk docs-trail commit. Resolving these records your preference for future scans.

title: Apply one-line postcss overrides fix (H1, open 5 scans)
description: The postcss XSS CVE (GHSA-qx2v-qp2m-jg93) has been open across 5 consecutive scans. The fix is a single-line `overrides` block in package.json pinning postcss>=8.5.10, which reaches the transitive next@16.2.6 pin that a top-level bump cannot. This is an actionable, low-risk external change awaiting a decision.

title: Approve README enumeration fix — add ingest.ts to ledger/lib tree (v0.5.0 docs sync)
description: The v0.5.0 README rewrite (commit cf108a7) enumerates src/features/ledger/lib/ as 'round / amount / arithmetic / format' but omits the ingest.ts module (ingest boundary, shipped v0.3.0). I edited the file-tree comment in place to add '/ ingest'. This is the only working-tree change this run; the CHANGELOG [0.5.0] section needed no edit. The change documents no new code and is not committed/pushed.
